summary: Services for selected festivals of the ecclesiastical year
coll: <I> ; [II (fragmentary): Syriac M50N, ff. 4–5] [Syriac M50N, ff. 1–3; Syriac M63N, f. 3–4; Milan, Biblioteca Ambrosiana, A 296 inf., ff. 214–216, 219–221 (= Chabot 75; 6 ff.), belong to either quire I or II] (the latter to be checked on site!) ; [III:	Syriac M63N, f. 1; Syriac M50N, ff. 11–16; Syriac M63N, f. 2] ; IV (Greek V, traces): ff. 1–8 ; V (Greek VI, traces): ff. 9–16 ; VI (Greek VII, traces): ff. 17–24 ; VII (Greek traces): ff. 25–32 ; VIII (Greek traces): ff. 33–40 ; IX (Greek X): ff. 41–46 ; X (Greek XI): ff. 47–48, 50–55 ; XI (Greek XII): ff. 56–63 ; XII (Greek XIII): ff. 64–71 ; XIII: ff. 72–79 ; XIV (Greek XV): ff. 80–87 ; XV: ff. 88–91 ; XVI: ff. 92–99

related_mss.label: Originally belonged together with the following

mss.label: Milan, Biblioteca Ambrosiana, A 296 inf., (ff. 214–216, 219–221 = Chabot 75)

note: Iron gall and red ink used; text on some folios throughout the manuscript partially rewritten in black ink
Traces of ruling with hard point marking borders of the writing area

work_wit.alt_title: Services for selected festivals of the ecclesiastical year

excerpt.as_written: ܩܢܘܢܐ ܡܬܟܫܦܢܐ ܕܩܕܝܫܐ ܓܐܘܪܓܝܘܣ ܒܩܠܐ ܕ
note: Corresponds to Supplicatory canon to St George, mode 4

excerpt.as_written: ܥܘܠ ܠܚܕܘܬܐ ܫܒܝܚܬܐ ܗ̇ܝ ܕܡܪܟ ܘܐܠܗܟ. ܒܥܝ ܘܐܬܟܫܦ ܡܛܠܬܢ ܩܕܝܫܐ ܢܝܩܘܠܐ

contents.label: [Memory of St George]
note: Supplicatory canon to St George, mode 4 (f. 1r): odes 1, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7, 8, 9

contents.label: 3 Teshrin II (November), Feast of the Dedication of the Church of St George in Lydda
note: Kathisma on The Lord is God, mode 4 (f. 12v)
Canon on the Dedication of the Church, mode 4 (f. 18v): odes 1, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7, 8, 9

contents.label: 6 Shbat (February), Holy Martyr Julian of Emesa
note: Kathisma on The Lord is God, mode 3 (f. 22v), incipit only

contents.label: 6 Kanun I (December), [St] Nicholas the Bishop
note: Troparion on The Lord is God, mode 4 (f. 29v)
Another canon to St Nicholas, mode 2 (f. 34r): odes 1, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7, 8, 9

contents.label: 8 Teshrin II (November), Archangel Michael
note: Kathisma on The Lord is God, mode 4 (f. 37v)
Another canon to the angels, mode 8 (f. 43r): odes 1, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7, 8, 9

contents.label: 15 Ab (August), the Departure of Our Lady the Mother of God
note: Kathisma on The Lord is God, mode 1 (f. 47r)
(interpolation in a later hand) Stichera, mode 2 (f. 48v; continued on the inset, f. 49r–v)
Night canon by Father John with acrostic, mode 1 (f. 58r): odes 1, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7, 8, 9
Another canon by Father Cosmas, mode 4 (f. 62r): odes 1, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7, 8, 9
Stichera on the Mother of God whenever needed, mode 1 (f. 67r)
Supplicatory canon to the Mother of God, mode 6 (f. 68v): odes 1, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7, 8, 9
Supplicatory canon to the Mother of God, mode 1 (f. 72r): odes 1, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7, 8, 9
Another canon to the Mother of God, mode 6 (f. 79r): odes 1, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7, 8, 9
Another supplicatory canon to the Mother of God in the time of suffering and persecution, mode 4 (f. 82v): odes 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7, 8, 9
Another supplicatory canon to the Mother of God, mode 8 (f. 94r): odes 1, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7, 8, 9

contents.label: [Other materials]
note: Three odes of the canon (=Triodion) to St George (f. 97v): odes 5, 8, 9

program.label: NEH Syriac Parchment Descriptions Grant
program.description: Catalogued as part of UCLA Library's "Identification and Description of the Syriac and Arabic Manuscripts at St. Catherine’s Monastery of the Sinai, Phase 1: Syriac Parchment Manuscripts" project (2022-2025), funded by the National Endowment for the Humanities. Principle cataloguers were Grigory Kessel (Lead cataloguer), Natalia Smelova (Associate cataloguer), and Vevian Zaki (Cataloguer for Arabic content in Syriac manuscripts).

program.description: Catalogued as part of UCLA Library's "Identification and Description of the Syriac and Arabic Manuscripts at St. Catherine’s Monastery of the Sinai, Phase 1: Syriac Parchment Manuscripts" project (2022-2025), funded by the National Endowment for the Humanities. Principle cataloguers were Grigory Kessel (Lead cataloguer), Natalia Smelova (Associate cataloguer), and Vevian Zaki (Cataloguer for Arabic content in Syriac manuscripts).

program.label: Sinai Library Digitization Project, Phase 1
program.description: Digitized under the Sinai Library Digitization Project, Phase 1 (2018-2023), a collaboration of St. Catherine’s Monastery of the Sinai, the Early Manuscripts Electronic Library, and UCLA Library, with funding from the Arcadia Fund, the Ahmanson Foundation, and the Steinmetz Family Foundation. The project provided high-resolution images and basic description of the Arabic and Syriac manuscripts held in the Monastery’s library.

image_provenance.rights: All manuscript images are the property of St. Catherine’s Monastery of the Sinai. No part of these images may be reproduced, reused, or distributed without prior written permission. For permissions and reuse requests, please contact sinai@library.ucla.edu.
